home.description:0402a24265c26e8ed68d98d.source: 这里是我的个人主页，记录学习、开发和生活里的折腾过程: 从机器人与嵌入式，到 Web、工具和一些日常思考。
home.description:0402a24265c26e8ed68d98d.target: A personal homepage for learning, development, and everyday tinkering: from robotics and embedded systems to web tools and practical notes.

home.focusAreas.0.summary:de57b57341ea28.source: 围绕 C/C++、Python 与 Linux 环境，沉淀 STM32、ESP32、FreeRTOS 与驱动开发实践。
home.focusAreas.0.summary:de57b57341ea28.target: C/C++, Python, Linux, STM32, ESP32, FreeRTOS, and driver development practice.

home.focusAreas.1.summary:dfe1e1854c2196.source: 持续实践 ROS1 / ROS2 的运动控制、导航建图与传感器融合，并结合 OpenCV 做环境感知。
home.focusAreas.1.summary:dfe1e1854c2196.target: ROS1 / ROS2 motion control, navigation, mapping, sensor fusion, and OpenCV-based perception.

home.focusAreas.2.summary:acf422d374d719.source: 使用 Qt6 构建上位机与可视化调试工具，提升机器人项目的开发效率与可维护性。
home.focusAreas.2.summary:acf422d374d719.target: Qt6 host tools and visual debugging utilities that make robotics projects easier to maintain.

home.focusAreas.3.summary:3c362160176bdf.source: 基于 Nuxt 打造内容系统，持续优化内容组织、检索体验与前端性能。
home.focusAreas.3.summary:3c362160176bdf.target: A Nuxt-based content system with better organization, search, and frontend performance.

home.focusAreas.4.summary:7b51ecd5bf3095.source: 在 Android 平台开发控制与监控工具，实现设备联动、状态可视化与流程提效。
home.focusAreas.4.summary:7b51ecd5bf3095.target: Android control and monitoring tools for device integration, status visualization, and workflow efficiency.

home.focusAreas.5.summary:47e4c1320a814c.source: 以可复用的方式记录踩坑、设计取舍与项目反思，方便后续快速回顾与迭代。
home.focusAreas.5.summary:47e4c1320a814c.target: Reusable notes on pitfalls, design tradeoffs, and project reviews for later iteration.

home.focusDescription:5579138a588441f140.source: 聚焦工程实践与可落地经验，而不是只停留在概念。
home.focusDescription:5579138a588441f140.target: Focused on engineering practice and reusable experience, not just concepts.

mylogo.attitudeBody:58f7c4c9403e8a9df187.source: 因此，这个 Logo 是我的个人符号，也是我的技术态度。它代表我对机器人系统的理解：既关注底层硬件，也重视上层软件；既追求工程实现，也保留创造力和探索欲。它将我的名字、技术方向和个人气质压缩进一个简洁的几何标识里，象征着我希望持续构建更完整、更可靠、更智能的机器人系统。
mylogo.attitudeBody:58f7c4c9403e8a9df187.target: This logo is both my personal symbol and my technical attitude. It reflects how I understand robotic systems: caring about low-level hardware while valuing upper-layer software, pursuing engineering implementation while keeping creativity and curiosity alive. It compresses my name, technical direction, and personal temperament into a concise geometric mark.

mylogo.cards.0.body:6833fa0ffb86755ff5ce.source: 向上的结构感，代表技术方向、持续成长和向上探索。
mylogo.cards.0.body:6833fa0ffb86755ff5ce.target: The upward structure represents technical direction, growth, and exploration.

mylogo.cards.1.body:59099dd115681a27f196.source: 开放而有连接性的轮廓，象征协作与对外部世界的感知。
mylogo.cards.1.body:59099dd115681a27f196.target: The open connected outline suggests collaboration and perception of the outside world.

mylogo.cards.2.body:19d5e6b878ab5260b8a0.source: 稳定的支撑模块，代表硬件、系统架构与工程实现能力。
mylogo.cards.2.body:19d5e6b878ab5260b8a0.target: The stable support module represents hardware, system architecture, and engineering implementation.

mylogo.greenBody:4219a4551ee324ba004b6cc.source: 绿色是这个 Logo 的主色。相比冷硬的工业色彩，绿色更强调成长、生命力与持续迭代。机器人并不只是机械、代码和电路的组合，它也承载着对现实世界的感知、行动与反馈。对我来说，绿色代表一种不断调试、不断优化、不断向前推进的状态：从一块开发板、一段驱动程序、一个节点，到一台能够自主运动的机器人，技术在一次次实践中逐渐生长。
mylogo.greenBody:4219a4551ee324ba004b6cc.target: Green is the main color of this logo. Compared with colder industrial colors, it emphasizes growth, vitality, and continuous iteration. Robotics is not only mechanics, code, and circuits; it also carries perception, action, and feedback from the real world. For me, green represents the state of debugging, optimizing, and moving forward step by step.

mylogo.letterSectionBody:d0cfcdef2c770a5.source: 这个 Logo 以我的名字 Tung Chia-hui 的首字母 T / C / H 为核心，将三个字母融合进一个类似立方体的几何结构中。它不只是一个简单的姓名缩写，而是一个带有工程感和系统感的个人标识：中间向上的 T 像一条主轴，代表技术方向、持续成长和向上探索；左侧的 C 像一个开放的结构框架，象征连接、协作与对外部世界的感知；右侧的 H 则像稳定的支撑模块，代表硬件、系统架构与工程实现能力。
mylogo.letterSectionBody:d0cfcdef2c770a5.target: This logo centers on the initials T / C / H from my name, Tung Chia-hui, and blends them into a cube-like geometric structure. It is more than a simple monogram: the upward T acts like a main axis for technical direction, growth, and exploration; the C forms an open frame that suggests connection, collaboration, and perception; the H becomes a stable support module for hardware, system architecture, and engineering implementation.

mylogo.metaDescription:20bcf337fc2461651.source: Tung Chia-hui 个人 LOGO 介绍：以 T / C / H 为核心的绿色几何个人标识。
mylogo.metaDescription:20bcf337fc2461651.target: Tung Chia-hui personal logo: a green geometric mark built around T / C / H.

mylogo.summary:1394f6d4ef312610003c2ba58.source: 一个把名字、机器人方向和工程气质压缩在一起的绿色几何符号。
mylogo.summary:1394f6d4ef312610003c2ba58.target: A green geometric symbol that compresses my name, robotics direction, and engineering temperament into one mark.

start.greetings.early:246109f1f6eb8622bd.source: 早上好，先找到今天的节奏。
start.greetings.early:246109f1f6eb8622bd.target: Good morning. Start by finding today's rhythm.

start.greetings.evening:9d2fa76e39b5f49e.source: 晚上好，收束今天，也留点余地。
start.greetings.evening:9d2fa76e39b5f49e.target: Good evening. Wrap up today and leave some room.

start.greetings.morning:07ea0566585dcf57.source: 上午好，适合做一点需要专注的事。
start.greetings.morning:07ea0566585dcf57.target: Good morning. This is a good time for focused work.

start.greetings.night:f480c47cf41ea77883.source: 夜深了，做完这一件就早点休息。
start.greetings.night:f480c47cf41ea77883.target: It is late. Finish this one thing and rest soon.

start.greetings.noon:dbfc1edad5cf0494104.source: 中午好，慢一点也没关系。
start.greetings.noon:dbfc1edad5cf0494104.target: Good noon. It is okay to slow down a little.
